User.title: User
User.description: Represents a guest student profile managed via localStorage ID.

id.description: Unique identifier for the guest (stored in localStorage).

role.description: The role of the user (defaults to Student).

assessment.description: The high-fidelity results of the career evaluation including intelligence scores and recommended pathway.

auth.reasoning: Auth.js (NextAuth v5) integrated for dashboard protection and student data synchronization.

definition.description: Stores guest profile and assessment data.

firestore.reasoning: All assessment paths are publicly accessible to empower Frere Town students with free guidance. Admin paths are secured via device-level token verification.
